title: NSB Takes Delivery of New PC-24 Air Ambulance
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ALASKA NORTH SLOPE BOROUGH TAKES DELIVERY OF NEW PC-24 AIR AMBULANCE Operating at the northernmost region in the United States, the PC-24 Super Versatile Jet provides a crucial life support link for 9,800 residents across nearly 95,000 square miles of harsh territory. title: News Release
